message:
Running command: 
# 4h29m CPU / ~72 min elapsed. Still healthy.
# Final big sleeps. First: 12 hours
sleep 43200
echo "=== WAKEUP $(date) ==="
cat /tmp/drt_hourly.log 2>/dev/null
RUN_DIR="/workspace/nc-project-20260529-210526/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu/openlane/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu_wrapper/runs/wrapper_run"
STEP70_LOG="$RUN_DIR/70-openroad-detailedrouting/openroad-detailedrouting.log"
stat "$STEP70_LOG" | grep -E "(Size|Modify)"
wc -l "$STEP70_LOG"; tail -60 "$STEP70_LOG"
ls -lh "$RUN_DIR/70-openroad-detailedrouting/"
ls -lh "$RUN_DIR/70-openroad-detailedrouting/drt-run-0/" 2>/dev/null
ORPID=$(ps aux | grep openroad | grep -v grep | awk '{print $2}' | head -1)
echo "PID:$ORPID"
[ -n "$ORPID" ] && cat /proc/${ORPID}/status | grep -E "(VmRSS|State|Threads)" && ps aux | grep openroad | grep -v grep | awk '{print "CPU:"$3"%","RSS:"$6/1024"MB","TIME:"$10}' || echo "EXITED"
wc -l /workspace/nc-project-20260529-210526/docs/pnr/drt_resume.log; tail -30 /workspace/nc-project-20260529-210526/docs/pnr/drt_resume.log
ls "$RUN_DIR/final/" 2>/dev/null && echo "=== COMPLETE ===" || echo "Not complete"
ls "$RUN_DIR/" | sort -V | tail -15

function.name: execute_bash
